official.name: Ron DeSantis
official.office_address: The Capitol, 400 S Monroe St, Tallahassee, FL 32399

summary.narrative: DeSantis emphasizes delivering on campaign commitments through legislative collaboration. Major accomplishments include $3.5B Everglades restoration, $5.3B debt paydown, education ranking improvements, and pro-business policies. Initiatives span environmental protection, fiscal responsibility, education, immigration enforcement, and gun rights.
summary.grade_rationale: Demonstrable progress on major fiscal and environmental promises with measurable outcomes; incomplete data on education rankings and some policy objectives; strong execution capability shown but some promises remain in progress or redefined.

promises.normalized: Invest $3.5 billion in Everglades restoration and water resource protection
Achieve top-3 ranking in NAEP and K-12 education achievement rankings
Pay down $5.3 billion in state debt and improve fiscal responsibility
Enforce E-Verify mandate for businesses and restrict sanctuary city protections

data_gaps: Specific NAEP ranking outcomes and timeline for education goal achievement
Status of open carry gun legislation implementation
Business rent tax elimination progress and completion date
Flood mitigation and sustainable growth metrics with local governments
Department of Commerce and Government Efficiency measurable results
E-Verify enforcement rates and sanctuary city protections status
Details on 3.7M new business formation attribution to policy
Complete budget allocation tracking for environmental initiatives
